\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5281 introduces Vacuum Stress-Energy Tensor as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
\(T_{\text{vacuum}} = \langle \text{TZP}|T^{\mu\nu}|\text{TZP}\rangle \exp(-r^2/\xi_{\text{coherence}}^2)\)
\]
